items.headline: Danaher’s Cepheid Ebola Tests Highlight Diagnostics Role In Global Crises
items.summary: Cepheid, a Danaher (NYSE:DHR) subsidiary, is donating and deploying Xpert Hemorrhagic Fever panel tests in response to the Ebola Bundibugyo outbreak in the Democratic Republic of the Congo and Uganda. The support is aligned with the World Health Organization's declaration of a Public Health Emergency of International Concern. The rapid rollout of these diagnostic tests is aimed at strengthening frontline Ebola detection and response capacity in affected regions. For investors watching...

items.headline: 3 of Wall Street’s Favorite Stocks with Questionable Fundamentals
items.summary: The stocks in this article have caught Wall Street’s attention in a big way, with price targets implying returns above 20%. But investors should take these forecasts with a grain of salt because analysts typically say nice things about companies so their firms can win business in other product lines like M&A advisory.
